title: Unbelievable value only at Econofoods
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Econofoods, we believe...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - At Econofoods, we believe that good food doesn't have to cost a fortune.


> For the past 28 years, we've been helping South Africans stock their fridges, freezers and pantries with everyday essentials at prices that are truly unbelievable.


From frozen favourites to pantry must-haves, our shelves are filled with quality products that stretch your budget without compromising on taste.

To make everyday meals even easier, we've created our brand-new Unbelievable Lunchbox Recipe Book!

Inside you'll find delicious, creative and budget-friendly recipes, all portioned and costed at under R25 per serving. Perfect for school lunchboxes or busy workdays, these recipes show that mealtimes can be fun, flavourful and affordable.

And because some appetites are bigger than others, we've added a special 'Hungry Teenager' option - doubling the main item for growing teens while still keeping it affordable.

Every recipe has been carefully costed using Econofoods' unbeatable prices wherever possible. Where an item isn't available at Econofoods, we've used the average retail price to keep the costing realistic and transparent. That way you'll know exactly what to expect when planning your budget-friendly meals.

The best part? Most of the ingredients you'll need are available in-store or online at Econofoods, always at unbelievable prices.

Want your copy? Simply scan the QR code in the ad below to download the Unbelievable Lunchbox Recipe Book and start creating meals that are as kind to your wallet as they are to your taste buds.

Because at Econofoods, unbelievable isn't just a word - it's what we do.

Our brand-new Unbelievable Lunchbox Recipe Book.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
